hero.subtitle: Sourcing, wholesale & COD — Morocco and beyond
hero.note: COD · Sourcing · Morocco 🇲🇦 — nationwide delivery, cash on delivery

steps.heading: Get started in 3 simple steps
steps.s1Text: Choose your profile — affiliate, wholesale buyer or supplier — and sign up for free in a few minutes.
steps.s2Text: Access the B2B catalog and local stock, share your affiliate links, or list your products on the marketplace.
steps.s3Text: Cash on delivery (COD) in Morocco, tracked commissions, shipping and customs handled by the platform.

countries.heading: Present in 5 key markets
countries.intro: From local Moroccan stock to major import hubs — shipping and customs handled by the platform.

finalCta.heading: Ready to grow your business?
finalCta.text: Join Mozouna Group and get instant access to COD affiliation, the wholesale catalog and international sourcing.

footer.about: B2B platform — COD affiliation, wholesale buying and international sourcing. Nationwide delivery across Morocco, secure payment.

opportunities.matchingSubtitle: The engine uses this data to match you with incoming requests.

opportunities.emptySubtitle: Complete your RFQ profile above to be included in upcoming matches.
opportunities.scoreLabel: Category: {cat}/{catMax} · Country: {country}/{countryMax} · MOQ: {moq}/{moqMax} · Lead time: {lead}/{leadMax} · Reliability: {rel}/{relMax} · Responsiveness: {rate}/{rateMax}

samples.pageSubtitle: The buyer's identity is masked. Reply only via files.
samples.emptyState: No sample requests at the moment.

catalogs.pageSubtitle: Upload your PDF, XLSX or ZIP catalogs. Visible only to the administration.

premium.limitReachedNotice: Limit reached. Upgrade to submit more products.
premium.ctaModifySub: Contact support to modify your subscription.
premium.faq1A: Billing is monthly and handled manually by our team. You will be contacted via WhatsApp to confirm payment.
premium.faq2A: When a wholesaler submits a purchase request (RFQ), our engine assigns you a matching score. Paid plans automatically increase your score, improving your position in the matched supplier list.
premium.faq3Q: Is the Featured badge visible to wholesalers?
premium.faq3A: Yes. Your products display a badge in the marketplace, and Featured suppliers appear at the top of the list.
premium.faq4Q: Can I cancel at any time?
premium.faq4A: Yes. Contact our team and we will cancel your subscription at no extra charge.
premium.waMessage: Hello, I would like to switch to the {plan} plan on Mozouna Marketplace.

submitProductForm.photosHelper: Paste one image URL per line.

cart.priceNote: Prices are calculated based on active tiers. The total updates after each quantity change.

quoteRequestDetail.bannerQuoteReadyBody: Mozouna Group has prepared your quote. Review the document for pricing, fees and estimated lead times.
quoteRequestDetail.bannerOrderBody: Your quote was accepted and a wholesale order has been created.

quoteSubmit.decisionSubtitle: Accept or decline this quote. Your response will be forwarded to our team.
quoteSubmit.confirmAcceptBody: By accepting, you confirm your agreement to the terms and amounts in this quote. Our team will be notified.
quoteSubmit.confirmRejectBody: By declining, you indicate that the conditions do not meet your expectations. Contact our team to negotiate.
quoteSubmit.decisionSaved: Decision saved. The page will refresh…
quoteSubmit.docLegalText: Prices, shipping costs, customs duties and delivery times are estimates based on information available at the time of quoting. International shipping may be affected by weather, geopolitical conditions, customs controls, carrier delays or force majeure. Stated timelines are not binding commitments. Mozouna Group undertakes to carry out the legal import and delivery procedures and to provide the relevant commercial invoice.

sourcingCta.ctaBody: Our team will source it for you from Turkey, China, Egypt or Dubai.
sourcingCta.fieldProductPlaceholder: Describe the product you are looking for...
sourcingCta.waGreeting: Hello, I would like to request custom sourcing.

form.consent: By ordering, you agree to be contacted to confirm delivery.

affiliate.title: Your affiliate account is under review
affiliate.intro: Your request to become an affiliate (COD dropshipping) has been received. Our team will process it within 24 to 48 hours.
steps: Access to the catalog, referral links and commission tracking

wholesaler.title: Your wholesale account is under review
wholesaler.intro: Your request to buy wholesale (B2B) has been received. Our team will process it within 24 to 48 hours.
steps: Access to the wholesale catalog, price tiers and B2B orders

supplier.title: Your supplier account is under review
supplier.intro: Your request to sell your products on the marketplace has been received. Our team will process it within 24 to 48 hours.
steps: Access to managing your products and quote requests

products.wholsaleTiers: {count, plural, one {# wholesale tier} other {# wholesale tiers}}
products.confirmDeactivate:
Deactivate "{name}"?

The product will be hidden from the catalogue and marketplace — active orders and carts will not be affected.

You can reactivate it at any time.
products.confirmDelete:
Permanently delete "{name}"?

⚠ This action is irreversible.
The product will be removed from the catalogue, marketplace and search results.
Existing orders retain their snapshot — they will not be affected.

Confirm only if this product has no active ongoing orders.

productForm.availLocalDesc: In stock. Can be sold by affiliates and/or wholesalers.
productForm.availImportDesc: B2B wholesale only. Not available for affiliates.
productForm.importSectionDesc: These fields represent transport and customs fees only — separate from the supplier purchase cost (entered in the "Factory cost" section below).
productForm.tariffGlobalDesc: Inherits the centralised tariff for this country (recommended)
productForm.tariffSelectHint: Select a country and shipping mode to see the global tariff.
productForm.customTariffWarning: Transport & customs fees only — do not include the product purchase price.
productForm.importNotesMixedWarn: Mixed origin detected — specify countries and conditions in notes.
productForm.importNotesPlaceholder: Ex: variable customs duty, random inspection…
productForm.sourcingInfo: This information is never visible to affiliates or wholesalers. It is used to trace product origin and will be used in future Telegram / supplier integration.
productForm.factoryCostHint: Actual cost in MAD. Basis for affiliate commission calculation.
productForm.sellPriceHint: Price shown to affiliates / platform reference price.
productForm.commissionDisabled: Affiliates are disabled for this product — no commission is paid.
productForm.commissionWarnZero: Zero or negative commission — adjust the sell price or reduce fees.
productForm.wholesaleMinQtyHintImport: Import on demand — recommended minimum: 10 units.
productForm.wholesaleMinQtyHint: Minimum quantity for a wholesale order.
productForm.tierHint: Prices rounded to whole MAD. Standard tiers: 10 / 50 / 100 / 500 units.
productForm.tierAutoTitle: Generates 4 standard tiers from factory cost MAD
productForm.tierEmptyWithCost: Click "✦ Auto" to generate the 4 standard tiers.
productForm.tierEmptyNoCost: Enter a factory cost to enable auto-generation.
productForm.mediasHint: Cover image + additional media (video, Telegram, links).
productForm.uploadHintFallback: Manual URL accepted as fallback (e.g.: external CDN link, Telegram).
productForm.notApprovedYet: The product must be approved before it can be activated.
productForm.coverFileHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP · max 10 MB · auto-resized
productForm.coverDropError: Drop an image file (JPEG, PNG or WebP).

payouts.createPanelDescription: Select an affiliate: the amount is calculated automatically (sum of their approved commissions). You confirm the disbursement and add a reference. All their approved commissions are then marked as paid.

createPayoutForm.affiliateOption: {name} — {amount} approved ({count, plural, one {# commission} other {# commissions}})
createPayoutForm.amountNote: Exact sum of the affiliate’s approved commissions. Not editable: the amount cannot diverge from settled commissions.
createPayoutForm.warning: Manually verify payment proofs before confirming. Validation is always human — no automatic approval.
